title: Session Count
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM LoadGame WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} game session(s) started during the report period. Session count puts scale on everything else in this report — a huge earnings total spread across a single session is a very different achievement from the same total built across thirty separate sessions over a full week.
details.help: LoadGame fires at the start of each game session. total drives the title as the session count.

tagLines: Game session count compiled from LoadGame journal records.
Every session in this count was a decision to log in. That's the first step every time.
One long session or many short ones — the total count frames what everything else in this report means.
